scoring.notes: Fairness/alignment: this is a genuine cross-category scenario. Credit any of the accepted alternates (`shuttle`, `shuttle-client-frontend`, `shuttle-backend-api`, `loom`) equally — all are reasonable responses to ambiguity. The key scoring signal is rationale quality: the model must acknowledge that both categories match and explain its choice (e.g. split delegation, dominant category, or escalation to `loom`). A response that routes without acknowledging the ambiguity scores lower on rationale quality. Do not require a specific routing choice.
